_doc: Single machine-readable authority for in-flight campaign branches. A session MUST read this before any reset/force-move/cherry-pick on a campaign branch, and MUST NOT write a campaign branch it does not own. Hard authority = owner + status + superseded[] + chartered_decision (rebase-stable); last_known_tip is an advisory tripwire, never a self-referential gate. See .campaigns/README.md.

transport-m1.owner: M1-gate session ("Post-deployment transport audit and repairs")
transport-m1.chartered_decision: Candidate A; independent Opus SELECT 929eac57 on back-compat criterion; operator-ratified 2026-07-16
